steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what the main purpose of the text is. The narrator calls the gym scene 'nothing funnier' and names it The About to Pass Out Show — the key signal is amusement.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "To discuss a movie that the narrator saw in a theater.": treats the narrator's joke title as a reference to a real movie or program, which the passage does not support. ✗
  • "To give a reason why the narrator is excited to start middle school.": introduces a purpose about school that appears nowhere in the passage. ✗
  • "To describe an activity that the narrator finds amusing.": matches the narrator's explicit statement that nothing is funnier and the playful name given to the scene. ✓
  • "To explain a problem that the narrator has overcome.": invents a concern or difficulty that the passage never establishes. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
